navigation_overview:
PHP Travels is a comprehensive travel booking platform. When visitors arrive, they land on the home page with a top navigation bar featuring options for Home, Hotels, Flights, Tours, Cars, Visa, Offers, Blog, and Account/Login. The home page displays a prominent search widget that allows users to search for Hotels, Flights, Tours, or Cars through tabs. The right side of the navigation shows currency/language selectors and a Login/Signup option. After successful authentication, users can access their dashboard which displays booking history, profile settings, and account management options. The main navigation remains consistent across all pages, with additional contextual menus appearing based on the current section.

---

module_summaries.summary:
Line 1: Use the search widget to switch between Hotels, Flights, Tours, and Cars, enter search criteria (destination/trip type, dates, rooms/guests, passengers, cabin class) and start a search.
Line 2: Shows tab-specific search fields and inputs (destination, check-in/check-out, trip type, travel dates, room/guest counts, passenger counts, cabin class) ready for submission.

Line 1: Create a new user account by entering personal details, mobile and address, accepting Terms and Conditions, and submitting the registration form.
Line 2: Shows registration fields (first/last name, email, password/confirm, mobile with country code, address, country), inline validation errors or success/verification prompts.

Line 1: Sign in with email/password, optionally use Google/Facebook social login, enable Remember Me, use Forgot Password, and complete CAPTCHA if required.
Line 2: Shows email and password fields, Remember Me checkbox, social login buttons, Forgot Password link, login errors and CAPTCHA when triggered.

Line 1: Request a password reset by submitting your email and follow the emailed reset link to set a new password within the expiry period.
Line 2: Shows the email input, Reset Password button, confirmation or error messages, and instructions/expiry info for the reset link.

Line 1: Search for hotels by entering destination, dates, rooms and guest counts, apply sidebar filters, and click Book Now to begin booking.
Line 2: Shows hotel listing cards with name, location, star rating, thumbnail, starting price per night, amenity icons, Book Now button and active collapsible filters in the sidebar.

Line 1: View full hotel details, select room type and dates, complete a booking by providing guest contact details and any special requests.
Line 2: Shows photo gallery, full property description, location map, room types with pricing and occupancy, guest reviews and aggregate rating, policies (cancellation, check-in/out) and a detailed price breakdown.

Line 1: Search flights by trip type, departure/arrival cities, travel dates, passenger counts and cabin class, then select a flight to proceed to booking.
Line 2: Shows flight results with airline logo/name, departure/arrival times and airports, total duration, number of stops, price per passenger and a Select button with expandable fare details.

Line 1: Review the itinerary and fare breakdown, enter passenger passport and contact details, choose meal/seat preferences and complete the flight booking.
Line 2: Shows full itinerary summary, passenger count and cabin class, fare breakdown (base fare, taxes, fees, totals per passenger and overall) and passenger form fields (title, name, DOB, passport, expiry, contact).

Line 1: Search tours by destination, travel dates, tour type, duration and budget, filter and sort results, then select a tour to view details or book.
Line 2: Shows tour cards with image, name, destination, duration, starting price per person, brief description, availability status and traveler rating, plus sidebar filters.

Line 1: View full tour details, select a departure date and number of travelers, then book by entering traveler names, contact details and special requirements.
Line 2: Shows slideshow, day-by-day itinerary, inclusions/exclusions (meals, accommodation, activities, transportation), available departure dates, per-person pricing for adults/children, map, reviews and terms.

Line 1: Search car rentals by pick-up/drop-off location and date/time and driver age, filter by vehicle category and initiate booking via Book Now.
Line 2: Shows grouped vehicle listings by category with vehicle image, make/model, transmission, fuel policy, seating/luggage capacity, feature icons, price per day and total rental cost for the selected period.

Line 1: Review selected vehicle and rental period, choose insurance and add-ons, enter driver details and confirm the car booking.
Line 2: Shows selected vehicle details, pick-up/drop-off locations and times, full pricing breakdown (daily rate, days, taxes, insurance, fees), and available add-ons and insurance plans.

Line 1: Check visa requirements by selecting nationality and destination, then complete and submit a visa application with required documents.
Line 2: Shows visa requirements for the chosen route (visa type, processing time, required documents, fees) and an application form with personal/travel fields and document upload area.

Line 1: View and manage all bookings across services, edit profile details, access wallet/credits and download confirmations, invoices or vouchers.
Line 2: Shows My Bookings with booking reference, service type, travel dates, status (Pending/Confirmed/Cancelled) and action buttons (View Details, Cancel, Modify), plus profile and wallet information.

Line 1: View a booking's full details and, where allowed, modify travel dates or traveler info and initiate cancellation with confirmation and refund details.
Line 2: Shows confirmation number, full service information, traveler and payment details, current booking status, booking type and applicable cancellation policy and fees.

Line 1: Pay for bookings using supported methods (Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer, Wallet) by entering payment details and optionally saving a card.
Line 2: Shows full booking summary with price breakdown (base price, taxes, service fees, discounts, total), payment method options, card form fields and security/SSL indicators.

Line 1: Change the site currency and language; preferences are applied immediately and saved to profile or session depending on authentication.
Line 2: Shows a currency selector that updates all displayed prices in real-time and a language selector that switches interface labels and content across the site.

Line 1: Refine listing results using the left sidebar's collapsible filters and top sorting controls, with both common and listing-specific filters.
Line 2: Shows the filters (price slider, star/review ratings) and listing-specific options plus the results grid reflecting active filters and sort order.

Line 1: Read and filter listing reviews and, if eligible, submit a review with ratings, comments and photos for completed bookings.
Line 2: Shows aggregate rating and total review count on listings and detailed individual reviews with overall and category-specific ratings, reviewer info, dates, stay date, comments and photos.

Line 1: Browse and filter promotional offers by service type, destination and dates, then click Book Now to apply the promotion or start a discounted booking flow.
Line 2: Shows promotional banners and deal cards with title, image, discount or special rate, validity period, Terms & Conditions link, and Book Now button including last-minute and seasonal offers.

Line 1: Log out to terminate the current session and clear sensitive session data.
Line 2: Shows a post-logout redirect to the home page and prevents access to protected pages until the user logs in again.
